description_long: This is a mid-century modern wooden sideboard or credenza, featuring a rectangular body elevated on four slender, tapered legs. The front face displays three drawers on the left side, each with a rounded wooden handle, and two cabinet doors on the right, each with a vertical handle. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a warm, natural appearance, and the handles are slightly darker, providing a subtle contrast. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or practical objects. The back and sides are plain, with the back panel being unadorned and the sides showing the same wood finish as the rest of the piece. This type of furniture is commonly found in living rooms, offices, or lobbies in urban environments, serving both storage and display functions.
description: A mid-century modern wooden sideboard with three drawers, two cabinet doors, and slender tapered legs, finished in a warm wood tone with contrasting handles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain wooden panel and the depth of the cabinet, with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three drawers with rounded handles on the left and two cabinet doors with vertical handles on the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing a plain wooden panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel with no handles, drawers, or doors visible.
